title: Artifact Collection
description: Collection of research artifacts from systems and security conferences, including evaluation badges and repository links. Generated by the artifact_analysis pipeline.

Artifact.title: Artifact
Artifact.description: A single research artifact associated with a conference paper.

conference.description: Conference abbreviation where the paper was published.

badges.description: Artifact evaluation badges awarded to this artifact. Canonical values: 'available', 'functional', 'reproduced', 'reusable', 'replicated'. Some conferences use non-normalized variants (e.g., 'Badges: Available', 'Functional', 'Artifacts Available + Functional').

repository_url.description: DEPRECATED: Use artifact_urls instead. Kept for backward compatibility.

artifact_url.description: DEPRECATED: Use artifact_urls instead. Kept for backward compatibility.

artifact_urls.description: All artifact-related URLs (repositories, archives, DOIs). Canonical field replacing repository_url, artifact_url, and github_url.

paper_url.description: DOI or direct link to the published paper.

appendix_url.description: URL to supplementary materials or appendix.
